verdict: High AI displacement risk, with potential for significant automation of routine tasks.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: The data scientist's role involves analyzing and manipulating large sets of data, which is a routine cognitive task that can be automated by current LLMs.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment
reasoning_steps.body: While some creative judgment is required in data science, the field has become increasingly reliant on statistical software and machine learning algorithms, reducing the need for human creativity.

reasoning_steps.title: Regulatory Moat
reasoning_steps.body: The data scientist's role does not require licensure or fiduciary duty, which means that AI can potentially perform this work end-to-end without human oversight.

adjacent_careers.name: Data Analyst
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Data analysts perform similar tasks, but with less emphasis on machine learning and more focus on data visualization.

adjacent_careers.name: Business Intelligence Developer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Business intelligence developers create reports and dashboards using data analysis and visualization tools, but may not have the same level of machine learning expertise as data scientists.

recent_developments.headline: New AI-powered data analysis tool gains popularity among businesses
recent_developments.impact: This development suggests that AI-powered data analysis tools are becoming increasingly capable of automating routine tasks, potentially displacing human data scientists.

recent_developments.headline: AlphaFold reshapes structural biology research
recent_developments.impact: Predicted protein structures are now a default starting point for experimental design.

quotes.quote: AlphaFold has predicted the structure of nearly every known protein. Tasks that took a PhD student years now take seconds. The bottleneck has moved to the experiments and the questions.
quotes.speaker: Demis Hassabis
quotes.title: CEO, Google DeepMind; Nobel laureate in Chemistry 2024

quotes.quote: AI is the most profound technology humanity is working on, more profound than fire or electricity. In science it is already changing what is knowable.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet

quotes.quote: I can imagine a world where AI agents run thousands of experiments in parallel, and the human scientist's role becomes one of asking the right question and interpreting the result.
quotes.speaker: Fei-Fei Li
quotes.title: Co-Director, Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI
quotes.source: The Worlds I See / public lectures
